requirement.requirement_text: Data Architecture experience is highly desirable; this could include demonstrated experience designing a new Data Pipeline or a significant redesign of an existing Data Pipeline.
Suppliers are to provide contact details for at least 2 referees for whom the Supplier has performed similar services within the past 3 years.

Supplier is to attach a Resume / CV for each proposed Key Person. At a minimum, each Resume / CV must contain the following details: the candidate’s name; the role the candidate is being proposed for, including SFIA code and skill level; the candidate’s current security clearance level (with clearance reference number); an experience summary addressing the candidate’s suitability to perform the proposed Key Position, including qualifications, skills and experience, and dates of experience summaries; notification of time last served in the Australian Defence Force, or time since transition out of the ADF; The name and contact details of two professional referees whom the candidate has worked with in the past 3 years; and The CV for each candidate should not exceed a combined total of four (4) A4 pages in length.
